# Clang trunk: assertion "No known constraint!" in AsmOperandInfo::isMatchingInputConstraint during backend DAG for optimized-out inline asm with tied output

**Author:** Theaamadu
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/173616
**Status:** Open
**Labels:** backend:X86, crash, llvm:SelectionDAG, generated by fuzzer, regression:18

## Body

## Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/9c81nPEj3

- clang start crashing on `Trunk`
- generated by fuzzer

## Console
```console
clang: /root/llvm-project/llvm/lib/CodeGen/SelectionDAG/TargetLowering.cpp:5908: bool llvm::TargetLowering::AsmOperandInfo::isMatchingInputConstraint() const: Assertion `!ConstraintCode.empty() && "No known constraint!"' failed.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/ and include the crash backtrace, preprocessed source, and associated run script.

0.	Program arguments: /opt/compiler-explorer/clang-assertions-trunk/bin/clang -g -o /app/output.s -mllvm --x86-asm-syntax=intel -fno-verbose-asm -S --gcc-toolchain=/opt/compiler-explorer/gcc-snapshot -fcolor-diagnostics -fno-crash-diagnostics <source>

```

## Code
```c
/* PR tree-optimization/108684 */
/* This used to ICE as when we remove the store to
   `t`, we also would remove the inline-asm which
   had a VDEF on it but we didn't update the
   VUSE that was later on.  */
static int t;

int f(int *a) {
  int t1;
  asm(" " : "=XX"(t1) : : "memory");
  t = t1;
  return *a;
}
```

## Code
```c
/* PR tree-optimization/108684 */
/* This used to ICE as when we remove the store to
   `t`, we also would remove the inline-asm which
   had a VDEF on it but we didn't update the
   VUSE that was later on.  */
static int t;

int f(int *a) {
  int t1;
  asm(" " : "=XX"(t1) : : "memory");
  t = t1;
  return *a;
}
```
</details>


---

### Comment 3 - keinflue

Further reduction:
```cpp
void f() {
  int t1;
  asm(" " : "=XX"(t1) : :);
}
```
Type of `t1` does not seem to matter.

Regression since Clang 18: https://godbolt.org/z/TjWv5hGc9

---
